texto: Our Great Lakes, harbors, ports, and rivers provide not only vital resources for us to live, but an entire maritime way of life for so many people. The least we can do is protect it, and the way of life it provides for so many.
explicacao: Citação de Candice S. Miller sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Our Great Lakes, harbors, ports, and rivers provide not only vital resources for us to live, but …” articula vida, people, live em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como people e live.
